name: MSR: SEIFUU SHICHIHOURYUU (SEVEN FLOWING WATER DRAGONS)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Suiton)

Rank: 8 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 16

Learn DC: 23 | Successes: 6

Perform: 11 | Perform DC: 25

Components: E, F, Mas

You send forth seven water dragons as you swing your weapon. Make seven melee attacks with your held weapon, taking a -5 penalty to hit. The attacks can be divided among up to seven creatures within range, deal half weapon damage as water damage and cannot score a critical hit. A creature hit by one or more dragons suffers 1d6 water damage for each dragon that hit it (Fortitude negates).

You can deal 5d6 damage to ignore the water part of the material focus, instead creating dragons of blood, which deal 1d6 additional damage, changes all damage dealt to acid damage and adds the Acid descriptor.

Empower: Spend 1 Chakra to increase the damage dealt to each creature hit by one or more dragons by 1d6, up to 1d6 per 2 levels or 10d6 total. If the dragons are blood dragons, you deal yourself 1 additional die of damage per point of Chakra spent on empowering them.

Mastery: The third step allows you to take no damage when creating blood dragons.

The fifth step allows you to ignore the damage you would take when empowering this technique.
